violations.text: An accumulation of trash and debris was observed around the refuse area. Area to be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

The floors under retail shelves, throughout the facility, have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving (chip isle) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023

Refuse area was observed with an accumulation of litter and debris. Refuse area must be maintained clean and free of litter in order to prevent harborage conditions for pests. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023

The floors beneath market shelves and in the back room have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023
